details.productUrlName: Localized Destruction Extended Art Ripple Foil

customAttributes.description:
You get E, then you may pay one or more E. If you do, each creature you control with power equal to the amount of E paid this way gains indestructible until end of turn.
Destroy all creatures.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 6/14/2024. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText: Imperial detonators are calibrated to maximize devastation while minimizing collateral damage.
